member.name: F:GTA.EnterVehicleFlags.JackAnyone
member.summary:
Allow the
to jack regardless of relationship status if they have to jack someone to complete the enter vehicle task. Without this flag, the
won't jack those they respect or like where the relationship is set to
or
towards them, but may jack those they don't respect or like. Without this flag, the
will abort the enter vehicle task if they have to jack one of those who respect or like to complete the enter vehicle task.
